summary: 针对选中的 Booster Compressor (compressor-2) 生成参数修正提案，解决出口压力目标与吸入压力过于接近、最小流量旁路百分比过低以及效率参数超范围三项诊断问题。

answers.text: 已为 Booster Compressor 识别出三项参数问题：出口压力目标 270 kPa 仅比吸入压力 260 kPa 高 10 kPa，压缩比不足；最小流量旁路 2% 低于防喘振审查阈值；效率 104% 超出物理合理范围。建议分步调整：首先将出口压力目标提升至 520 kPa（压缩比约 2.0），其次将最小流量旁路提升至 10% 以满足防喘振要求，最后将效率修正为 85% 以落入典型离心压缩机范围。所有修改均为参数更新，不涉及拓扑变更。

issues.message: Booster Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the required compression duty.
Booster Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.
Booster Compressor efficiency_percent=104 is outside the recommended operating range.

proposed_actions.title: 提升 Booster Compressor 出口压力目标至 520 kPa
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前出口压力目标 270 kPa 仅比吸入压力 260 kPa 高 10 kPa，压缩比约 1.04，无法满足有效压缩任务。建议将出口压力目标提升至 520 kPa，形成约 2.0 的压缩比，属于典型增压压缩机工作范围。

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE
citations.excerpt: Booster Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the required compression duty.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW
citations.excerpt: Booster Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.
